---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? Why does this matter?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution. How should it work?

## Alternatives
What alternatives have you considered?

## Use Cases
Who is this for? What scenarios does it enable?

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, or anything else relevant.
